step_rationale: Cardiac-specific MURF1 ubiquitin ligase marks myocardial necrosis.
mechanism: TRIM63 (MURF1) is a cardiac-specific E3 ubiquitin ligase released during cardiomyocyte necrosis and protein degradation in acute myocardial infarction.

references.title: Circulating E3 ligases are novel and sensitive biomarkers for diagnosis of acute myocardial infarction.
